metadata.description: Tal's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: smart-notifications
plugins.description: OSX desktop notifications for Claude Code events

plugins.name: plan-refiner
plugins.description: Refine plans and specs through in-depth interviews using strategic questioning

plugins.name: karabiner
plugins.description: Skills for configuring and writing Karabiner-Elements rules on macOS

plugins.name: sort
plugins.description: Sort downloaded files into ~/Downloads/AI Library/ — dispatches by type (videos, images, archives, DMGs, apps) and delegates videos to a full transcription pipeline

plugins.name: iconifier
plugins.description: Generate and apply custom macOS folder icons for a directory's subfolders, matching the existing house style of icons on peers and parent

plugins.name: og-simplify
plugins.description: Resurrected /simplify — three-agent (reuse/quality/efficiency) review-and-fix pass over your changed code.
